nasb.text: I know that His commandment is eternal life; therefore the things I speak, I speak just as the Father has told Me.”

esv.text: And I know that his commandment is eternal life. What I say, therefore, I say as the Father has told me.”

cnv.text: 我知道他的命令就是永生。所以，我所講的，正是父吩咐我要我講的。”

ccb.text: 我知道祂的命令能带来永生。所以祂怎么告诉我，我就怎么说。”

csbs.text: 我知道他的命令就是永恒的生命。所以我所讲的，正是照着父所告诉我的来讲的。”
